new_classes.definition_en: Other spirituous beverages not elsewhere classified under heading 2208, including: spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda); tea with alcohol; mixtures of spirituous beverages with each other or with fruit or vegetable juices; and other beverages listed in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph, items 14–18. Classified under CN subheading 2208 90 69 (Chapter 22).
A beverage composed of tea combined with ethyl alcohol or a spirituous beverage, classified as an other spirituous beverage under CN subheading 2208 90 69.

new_classes.label_en: Spirituous Beverage with Added Aerated Water
new_classes.definition_en: A mixture of a spirituous beverage and aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), classified as an other spirituous beverage under CN subheading 2208 90 69.

new_classes.label_en: Mixture of Spirituous Beverages or Spirituous Beverages with Fruit/Vegetable Juices
new_classes.label_de: Mischung aus alkoholhaltigen Getränken oder alkoholhaltige Getränke mit Frucht- oder Gemüsesäften
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages mixed together, or spirituous beverages mixed with fruit or vegetable juices, classified as other spirituous beverages under CN subheading 2208 90 69.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the main distinguishing criteria for CN 22089069: (1) the overall class OtherSpirituousBeverage as a subclass of Spirit with the CN code hasValue restriction; (2) the whisky-soda / aerated water mixture subtype via SpirituousAeratedWaterMixture with hasSodaWaterAddition restriction; (3) tea with alcohol as AlcoholicTeaBeverage; (4) mixtures of spirituous beverages or with fruit/vegetable juices as MixedSpirituousBeverage. Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the legal text references HS Explanatory Note items 14–18 which list additional specific beverage types not fully enumerated in the truncated legal text provided; (b) the 'other' nature of the catch-all residual category is hard to fully formalise as disjointness axioms without complete enumeration of all sibling subheadings under 2208 90; (c) the complement restriction against OtherSpirit (22089056) is a coarse proxy for mutual exclusion rather than a fully enumerated sibling disjointness set.
